title: Introduction
text:
2 Official Research Questions

Primary Research Question (RQ1): Does AI sentiment carry predictive information about data-job demand beyond what the labor data alone provides?
Secondary Research Question (RQ2): Did the public release of ChatGPT mark a break in U.S. data-job demand, AI-jobs sentiment, or in both?
